2026/05/15 16:09:30.444168924 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444175802 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444215791 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444233866 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444235912 {
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444257700 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444258767 new <- list()
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444267076 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444267604 new$width <- width
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444275482 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444275975 new$height <- height

2026/05/15 16:09:30.444288960 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444297492 if (!missing(title))

2026/05/15 16:09:30.444322349 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444323343 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444336096 new$version <- version
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444337072 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444349951 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444350457 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444358134 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444358598 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444383610 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444386146 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444402855 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444403803 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444416238 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444417296 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444431565 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444432540 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444470872 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444472064 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444492703 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444499455 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444514484 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444516406 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444530412 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444531339 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444545356 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444546659 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444565670 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444566643 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444578530 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444579045 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444588050 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444588562 "default"))
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444611767 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444612813 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444634852 }
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444635927 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444650155 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444651011 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444664595 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444665149 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444673795 }
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444674299 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444681364 }
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444681862 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444688777 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444689286 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444700957 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444701904 domain = NA)
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444716711 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444717611 }
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444730385 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444731298 old$family <- family
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444741352 }
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444741860 version <- old$version
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444748665 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444749186 "2.0")
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444756350 if (version %in% versions)

2026/05/15 16:09:30.444766450 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444767075 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444780700 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444781700 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444798159 domain = NA)
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444803115 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444831848 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444832859 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444850660 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,

2026/05/15 16:09:30.444868244 invisible()

2026/05/15 16:09:30.444175802 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444215791 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,

2026/05/15 16:09:30.444235912 {

2026/05/15 16:09:30.444336096 new$version <- version
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444337072 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444349951 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444350457 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444358134 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444358598 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444383610 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444386146 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444402855 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444403803 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444416238 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444417296 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444431565 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444432540 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444470872 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444472064 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444492703 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444499455 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444514484 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444516406 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444530412 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444531339 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444545356 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444546659 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444565670 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444566643 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444578530 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444579045 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444588050 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444588562 "default"))
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444611767 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444612813 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444634852 }
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444635927 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444650155 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444651011 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444664595 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444665149 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444673795 }
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444674299 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444681364 }
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444681862 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444688777 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444689286 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444700957 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444701904 domain = NA)
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444716711 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444717611 }
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444730385 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444731298 old$family <- family
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444741352 }
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444741860 version <- old$version
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444748665 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",

2026/05/15 16:09:30.444766450 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444767075 onefile <- old$onefile

2026/05/15 16:09:30.444781700 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444798159 domain = NA)
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444803115 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444831848 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444832859 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/15 16:09:30.444850660 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,

2026/05/15 16:09:30.444868244 invisible()
